phrases.intent_en: Ask where craft stalls take cash
phrases.text_local: Com licença, onde estão as barracas de artesanato que só aceitam dinheiro?
phrases.pronunciation: KOHM lee-SAYNG-suh, OHNG-dih ihsh-TOWN UHSH buh-RAH-kuhsh DIH uh-ruh-tih-zuh-NAH-too KIH SAW uh-SAY-tuhng dee-NYAY-roo?
phrases.cultural_note: Craft stalls in Braga, especially on Rua do Souto, often operate cash-only. It is wise to carry euros for such purchases.

likely_response.local: Perto do Arco da Porta Nova.
likely_response.pronunciation: PEHR-too DOO AH-ruh-koo DUH PAW-ruh-tuh NAW-vuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Near the Arco da Porta Nova.

responses.english: Near the Arco da Porta Nova.
responses.phonetic: PEHR-too DOO AH-ruh-koo DUH PAW-ruh-tuh NAW-vuh.
responses.french: Perto do Arco da Porta Nova.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to pay for parking
phrases.text_local: Onde se paga o estacionamento aqui?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih SIH PAH-guh AW shtuh-seeoo-nuh-MAYNG-too uh-KEE?
phrases.cultural_note: Parking in Braga's historic center is strictly regulated at the Praça kiosk.

phrases.text_local: Desculpe, onde fica o Café Vianna?
phrases.pronunciation: dihsh-KOOW-pih, OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW kuh-FEH VEEAHNNG-nuh?
phrases.cultural_note: Café Vianna is a historic café in Braga, a popular meeting point.

likely_response.local: Na Praça da República, a dois minutos.
likely_response.pronunciation: NUH PRAH-suh DUH reh-POOB-lee-kuh, AH DOYSH mee-NOO-toosh.
likely_response.translation_en: At Praça da República, two minutes away.

responses.english: At Praça da República, two minutes away.
responses.phonetic: NUH PRAH-suh DUH reh-POOB-lee-kuh, AH DOYSH mee-NOO-toosh.
responses.french: Na Praça da República, a dois minutos.
